title: Largest Time for Given Digits
titleCn: 给定数字能组成的最大时间

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3,4] Output: "23:41" Explanation: The valid 24-hour times are "12:34", "12:43", "13:24", "13:42", "14:23", "14:32", "21:34", "21:43", "23:14", and "23:41". Of these times, "23:41" is the latest.
testcases.expectedOutput: "23:41" Explanation: The valid 24-hour times are "12:34", "12:43", "13:24", "13:42", "14:23", "14:32", "21:34", "21:43", "23:14", and "23:41". Of these times, "23:41" is the latest.

testcases.input: arr = [5,5,5,5] Output: "" Explanation: There are no valid 24-hour times as "55:55" is not valid.
testcases.expectedOutput: "" Explanation: There are no valid 24-hour times as "55:55" is not valid.
